description: Registry of model blind spots with recommended MCP tool combinations

cross_domain_connections.insight: Deadlock is the infinite-imbalance limit of detailed balance violation
cross_domain_connections.interpretation: If calc_deadlock finds a cycle AND audit_chemical_network shows cycle imbalance → same mathematical structure

cross_domain_connections.insight: PageRank defines an energy landscape: E_i = -log(PageRank_i)
cross_domain_connections.interpretation: Stationary distributions follow Boltzmann statistics; teleportation = external driving

cross_domain_connections.insight: COMMIT = measurement, isolation level = decoherence rate
cross_domain_connections.interpretation: Higher isolation = more classical (decohered) view of transaction state

cross_domain_connections.insight: Both optimize Σ p_i × cost_i with cost ∝ -log(p_i)
cross_domain_connections.interpretation: Shannon entropy bounds both bits needed AND work extractable

cross_domain_connections.insight: Both remove redundancy to get unique solutions
cross_domain_connections.interpretation: Most general unifier ↔ residual gauge freedom

single_domain_blind_spots.reason: Model often confuses proven vs conjectured relationships
Model is miscalibrated about its own capabilities

usage.detection: Check if query contains trigger_keywords from multiple domains
usage.action: If cross-domain match, call ALL listed tools and synthesize
usage.fallback: If tools unavailable, acknowledge blind spot explicitly
